string 2:
I can see you are concerned... but I am fine for now. Thanks to
your efforts, the village is now free from the Titans.

All may not be as it was, but I am certain more of our allies 
will be amenable now. Pray this leads to a ceasefire.

That would be nice. I don't want to see any more fighting.
But if and when we do achieve peace...

...I hope the relationship between humans and Digimon can
evolve, too.
Like the public safety office's D-SAT, for example. They're so heartless!
Inori...

I want to talk to my dad, to tell him he was wrong. I mean, doesn't
Aegiomon and I being so close prove it?

Maybe it's my calling to be a bridge between the two species...
a calling only I can perform.
I have an update.

We at ADAMAS consider tampering with history a dangerous
act that jeopardizes the natural laws and order of the world.

We consider the act of time traveling, too, to be a threat
to the world's stability and equilibrium.

We have just now ruled that Aegiomon is the most significant
single factor that endangers world homeostasis.

Thus, Aegiomon and his human partner are now targets of
eradication for ADAMAS.

However, we would like to continue to observe Aegiomon as
long as possible...

The brass at HQ may try to tell us to speed things up, but I'll
do what I can to hold them off.

After all, there's still a chance Aegiomon's power may be able to
prevent the Shinjuku Inferno.

Will he fall on the side of good or evil? If the latter... then 
you'll have no choice but to take him out yourself.
Hey, {player}, are you all right? You don't look so good...
...I'm fine. No need to worry.{next}
...We need to end this war, and fast.{next}
...My physical regimen is flawless.{next}
Are you sure? I'm a little worried...

After traveling together for so long, I've come to be able
to read your expressions, you know.
And you don't look like you usually do.

By the way, Merukimon is asking us to go to the Factorial
Area next.

Apparently, the Titans have taken control there. It's important
to liberate that area for ceasefire negotiations.

That building over there? You've never heard of the 
Paradise Colosseum?

It's always packed with spectators trying to get a glimpse of 
the Undisputed Champion.
Callismon is on a whole other level.

No one would recognize the one they used to call 
"the Bearmon Big Bro."
Big Bearmon...?{next}
Why does that name sound so familiar?{next}
I think maybe we've met before...{next}
So, you do know Big Bearmon?

They say in order to Digivolve, Big Bearmon joined the Titans to
get stronger.

And with that new strength, he became the Undisputed
Champion of the Coliseum and ruler of the Factorial Area!
Wait a minute. "Big Bearmon"...?

Is this the same "Big Bearmon" we met when we first got to
Central Town?

Big Bearmon used to be a bratty prankster, but now he's "the Tyrant," 
with enough strength to silence anyone.

Those who do well in the arena get special treatment.
Here,  power is everything.

Under the absolute rule of violence there is equality, I guess...
That's probably why it's not as bleak here as it is elsewhere.

You know, I've heard a rumor about Callismon having a 
little brother.

Oh, yeah. The little brother supposedly ran away from the
Digital World.
Ran away? Then he might be in Rebellion Village.
I wonder if Little Bearmon knows Big Bearmon became a Titan?

If not, we need to let Little Bearmon know. They're brothers,
so I'm sure the little brother is worried.
Let's try finding Little Bearmon in Rebellion Village.
Argh!
You're Bearmon, right?
Are you the Bearmon I saw in Central Town?{next}
Do you remember us?
Should I? Who are you people?
Wait a minute...
Could it be...?
I remember now. Humans were a rare sight back then.
But what are you doing here?
What about you? Why do you wanna be doing something like this now?
Big Bro... went missing...

The Titans attacked Central Town, and we got separated. I
haven't seen Big Bro since.
Some even say my brother's dead... I don't believe that, though.
Big Bro isn't the only one who's gone missing, either.
Merukimon's too soft. We should just take our town back already.
It was ours to begin with!
That's why I'm honing my strength... in this coliseum!
We heard a rumor about your Big Bro...

A Digimon that fits my Big Bro's description... is the Undisputed
Champion that rules over a Titan-run arena...
A bully... who controls people with violence...?
Big bro... What are you doing, you idiot...

We haven't been able to confirm anything yet, though. We still
have to collect more intel.
You people are the same as Merukimon.
I'm tired of being told to wait.
I get it, but that doesn't change the fact it's still just a rumor.

Let's go to the Paradise Colosseum together. As his little
brother, you might be able to talk to Callismon.
...Fine.

But you're not done here, you know. You won against me 
in a match.

Finish up quickly. Then take me to that "Paradise Colosseum" 
place, or whatever it's called.

And that does it for that match... Let's head to the 
Paradise Colosseum!
Hey, it's Hiroko...
Hello?

UHHH, HELLO?!?! Ugh! Why haven't you been answering your
phone?!

Don't make me worry like that! I thought maybe you disappeared
again, and I'd be here waiting another eight years...
Oh! Uh, sorry about that!

There's something I have to tell you guys, like, right now. Can you
come to Vision Square in Higashi-Shinjuku?
Huh? As in, now?

Please...? I-I know I'm gonna regret it if I don't tell you right now.
I'm just... scared you're gonna vanish again.
...Okay, Hiroko. I understand.
Yay! All right, I'll see you there!
Sorry, but this seems really important to her...

...I have many preparations of my own to make, especially
since it's my Big Bro we'll be facing.
Let's meet back up once we're both done.

Okay, sounds like a plan. We can meet in front of the
gate in Rebellion Village.

Well, let's go see Hiroko. She should be waiting for us at the 
Vision Square in Higashi-Shinjuku.
Whew, there you are! Hehe! I thought I'd never see you again!
You worry too much. You sound just like my dad...

Well, you aren't the one who's been kept waiting for eight
years. Eight years! Do you even know what that's like?
Anyway, you'll understand once you see.

Making anime has always been my dream. I saved up enough
money making videos... and made that dream come true.
Wait. What?! Seriously?! Hiroko, that's amazing!

This'll all make sense once you see it... But, anyway, what
I'm trying to say is, the focus of my dream changed.

After you disappeared eight years ago, my new focus changed
into trying to reach you, to find out where you'd gone...

That's why I need you to see what I've done. I've worked really
hard these past eight years.

It's supposed to air tomorrow, on that screen there. So... I don't
want you disappearing again until it does.

No matter what happens or where you go... just... make sure
you come back. Okay?
Okay... I promise.

...Now, we'd better get going! But we have to be sure to be
back here tomorrow, without fail!
Time to meet GrapLeomon at the gate in Rebellion Village.
...I bear a message for you from GrapLeomon.
It says, "This problem is just between us brothers. Sorry."
Wait. Does that mean... GrapLeomon went on ahead without us?!

The brothers are going to fight each other...? No! We can't let 
that happen!
Let's go after GrapLeomon!{next}
I guess GrapLeomon wanted to do this alone...?{next}
There might still be time.{next}
I just hope GrapLeomon doesn't do anything reckless.
What's going on here?!
That was crazy... I thought I was a goner.
Callismon went berserk mid-match and started attacking the spectators.
Lots of spectators have been hurt... or worse!
Why the spectators?{next}
How did this happen?{next}
That's horrible to even think about...{next}

It looked like the challenger was saying something... maybe he
got in the undisputed champion's head.
He was some newbie from somewhere. I think his name was "GrapLeomon"?
GrapLeomon fought... Callismon?

I'm not sure I'd call it "fighting." They were just talking
for the longest time.

And then Callismon went berserk, holding his head like it
was in pain.
I don't know what was said, but that's what happened.
Is GrapLeomon okay?
I don't think so. GrapLeomon got tossed around like an old rag.
No way... But they're brothers, aren't they...?
This is our fault! We shouldn't have let GrapLeomon go alone!
If only...
If I really do have some kind of power...
...I wish I could activate it now! Please!
Look at that!

The dark shadow responded to your call. It seems you're 
getting close to your true awakening.

Gaze into the abyss within the dark shadow. 
The abyss shall gaze back into you.

All you can do, is to look within yourself and change your
own actions—that's all.

Another death of a Digimon with the potential to become an
Aposlte... The Akashic Vision will be screened momentarily.

In the land of Iliad, the Bearmon Brothers shared an
inseparable bond.

The little one admired his big brother's strength and courage,
and the big one cherished the timid younger brother.

They both swore to become strong fighters, and sharpened
each other's skills as time went on.

Yet calamity befell them one fateful day, the day the Titans
attacked the town the brothers called home.

Though the brothers fought valiantly, they lacked the strength
to put up a real fight.

They were wounded in battle and chased out of town. In the
ensuing chaos, they were separated from one another.

Thus did time pass... Keeping his promise to his older brother,
the timid younger brother grew into a valiant warrior.

He continued to search for his big brother, but there was no
trace of him, anywhere.

The sadness from losing his brother eventually turned into rage,
and Little Bearmon's hatred of the Titans grew even stronger.

And the only way he found he could deal with that hatred
was with his fists.

By the time the two brothers were finally reunited... all
that awaited them... was gut-wrenching tragedy.
